title: 7th Pay Commission & DA Arrears
desc: Implement 7th Pay Commission for state employees and clear all pending DA arrears.

title: Annapurna Scheme — ₹3,000/month for Women
desc: Monthly ₹3,000 financial assistance to all eligible women under Annapurna Scheme.

title: Uniform Civil Code (UCC)
desc: Draft and pass Uniform Civil Code legislation in WB State Assembly.

title: Ayushman Bharat Rollout
desc: Full statewide implementation of Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance.

title: BSF Border Fencing
desc: Transfer land to BSF and complete Bangladesh border fencing.

title: Fill All State Dept Vacancies
desc: Transparent recruitment to fill 2 lakh+ vacant posts across departments.

title: CBI Investigation — TMC Corruption
desc: Refer all pending TMC-era corruption cases to CBI.

title: Ghatal Master Plan
desc: Execute the Ghatal Master Plan for permanent flood control.

title: Singur Industrial Park
desc: Restore Singur land as a modern industrial park.

title: Youth Grant — ₹2,000/month
desc: Monthly ₹2,000 stipend for unemployed educated youth.

title: BNS Criminal Code
desc: Implement BNS, BNSS, BSA criminal codes statewide.

title: White Paper Audit
desc: Publish White Paper on 15 years of TMC misgovernance.

title: SIT for SSC Scam
desc: Constitute SIT to probe SSC/TET recruitment scam.

title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
desc: Implement PM Vishwakarma for artisans with credit & skill training.
